description: Source of truth for calculator categories. Each category has a slug (URL segment), name (display), tagline (1-line intro), and tools array. The primary nav and /calculators/ hub render from this. Only categories with at least one tool should appear in the nav.

categories.name: AI
categories.tagline: Tools for working with AI APIs and large language models.

tools.name: LLM Token Usage Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate the per-call, daily, monthly and annual cost of an LLM workload across Claude, GPT, Gemini and DeepSeek. Side-by-side comparison, baked-in pricing dated for transparency, browser-only.

tools.name: AI Image Generation Cost Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate the per-image, monthly and annual cost of generating AI images. Side-by-side comparison across DALL-E 3, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion XL, Imagen 3 and Flux Pro.

tools.name: RAG Pipeline Cost Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate the monthly cost of running a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline. Embedding, vector database, and LLM query costs broken out, with a month-by-month projection and an LLM swap comparison.

tools.name: AI vs Human Writer Cost Calculator
tools.summary: Compare the monthly cost of producing written content via an LLM against a human writer. Per-word or per-hour human rates, side-by-side model table, honest about editorial trade-offs.

tools.name: AI Fine-Tuning Cost Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate the cost of fine-tuning an LLM. Training cost across GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Llama-3 on Together, and Mistral-7B, with the per-1000-call hosted inference cost for the tuned model.

tools.name: AI Hallucination Risk Calculator
tools.summary: Score the relative risk that an LLM output will hallucinate, given the model class, task, grounding and verification you have in place. Heuristic, browser-only, with the maths shown.

tools.name: Embedding Cost Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate the cost of generating embeddings for a corpus across OpenAI, Cohere, Voyage or a custom price. One-off, monthly, weekly or daily refresh, with total over the period and per-1000-docs cost.

tools.name: Prompt Token Estimator
tools.summary: Paste a prompt, pick a model family, see roughly how many tokens it will use across GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Llama and Mistral. Optional cost at your $/1K rate.

categories.name: Broadband
categories.tagline: Work out the speed, bandwidth, and plan that actually fits your household or office.

tools.name: Broadband Bandwidth Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate the download and upload speeds your household needs based on streaming, video calls, gaming, smart devices, and remote work.

tools.name: Cloud Backup Time Estimator
tools.summary: Work out how long the first cloud backup will take on Backblaze, iDrive or any other provider. Factors in protocol overhead, the realistic upload haircut, and overnight-only schedules.

tools.name: Web Hosting Storage & Bandwidth Estimator
tools.summary: Work out how much storage and monthly bandwidth your website needs based on your traffic, page weight, media files, and downloadable content. See which hosting tier fits.

tools.name: File Download Time Calculator
tools.summary: Work out how long a file will take to download given your line speed. Decimal MB, GB and TB, megabit and gigabit speeds, with a 5% protocol overhead included and the working shown.

tools.name: Latency Impact Calculator
tools.summary: See how ping, jitter and packet loss affect cloud gaming, FPS, video calls, browsing or SSH. Get a verdict per use case and an effective TCP throughput cap.

tools.name: VPN Throughput Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate effective speed through a VPN given your link speed, protocol (WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec), cipher, CPU class and server distance. Identifies whether encryption, link bandwidth or RTT is the bottleneck.

tools.name: Streaming Quality Calculator
tools.summary: Tells you what streaming quality your broadband can actually sustain across Netflix, Disney+, Prime Video and YouTube. Handles concurrent streams and headroom for other household traffic.

tools.name: ISP Speed Reality Check
tools.summary: Compare your advertised ISP speed against what you actually get. Models line attenuation, wifi loss, router standard caps and peak-hour contention to estimate the real wired and wifi speeds at your end.

categories.name: Math
categories.tagline: Everyday maths tools for quick, honest answers.

tools.name: Percentage Calculator
tools.summary: Work out a percentage of a number, what percentage one number is of another, or the percentage change between two values.

tools.name: Discount Calculator
tools.summary: Sale price calculator covering single discounts, stacked discounts, sales tax or VAT, and Buy X Get Y Free deals. Currency-agnostic, with workings shown.

tools.name: Fraction Calculator
tools.summary: Add, subtract, multiply or divide fractions and mixed numbers. Returns the simplified fraction, the mixed-number form and the decimal, with every step of the working shown.

tools.name: Standard Deviation Calculator
tools.summary: Paste a list of numbers and get count, mean, median, range, variance and standard deviation, sample and population, with the working shown step by step.

tools.name: GCD and LCM Calculator
tools.summary: Find the greatest common divisor (HCF) and lowest common multiple of two or more whole numbers. Shows the Euclidean algorithm, prime factorisations and the combined-prime LCM working.

tools.name: Quadratic Equation Solver
tools.summary: Solve any quadratic ax² + bx + c = 0. Returns the two roots, the discriminant, the vertex, the axis of symmetry and the y-intercept. Handles real and complex roots with full working shown.

tools.name: Logarithm Calculator
tools.summary: Calculate log_b(x) for any base, plus solve for x or b given the other two. Handles base 10, base e, base 2 and any custom base, with full step-by-step working using the change-of-base formula.

tools.name: Combinations & Permutations Calculator
tools.summary: Compute nCr, nPr, factorials and multinomial coefficients with arbitrary precision via BigInt. Supports with-repetition variants and shows the formula and working for each result.

categories.name: Images
categories.tagline: Resize, convert and inspect photos without uploading them anywhere.

tools.name: Photo Resizer
tools.summary: Resize and convert photos in your browser. Pick a width, a height, a format and a quality. Your image never leaves your device.

tools.name: WebP to JPG Converter
tools.summary: Convert WebP images to JPG or PNG in your browser. Drag and drop, bulk conversion, optional resize. Fixes the Chrome WebP problem in Word, Outlook and PowerPoint.

tools.name: Image Compressor
tools.summary: Compress JPG, PNG and WebP photos to a target file size like 2 MB or 500 KB, or pick a quality. Multiple files at once, browser-only, no upload.

tools.name: HEIC to JPG Converter
tools.summary: Convert iPhone HEIC and HEIF photos to JPG, PNG or WebP in your browser. Drop one file or a holiday's worth, get downloads back. Files never leave your device.

tools.name: Aspect Ratio Calculator
tools.summary: Work out the matching width or height that keeps an image or video at the same aspect ratio. Live two-way binding, simplified ratio shown via GCD, preset ratios in one click.

tools.name: Image File Size Estimator
tools.summary: Estimate the file size of a JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or HEIC from its pixel dimensions and quality, before you encode anything. Side-by-side comparison of all five formats.

tools.name: Image DPI / Print Size Calculator
tools.summary: Two-way DPI to print size converter. Solve for print size, DPI or pixel count needed, with a quality verdict (photo print, good, acceptable, pixelated) at the resulting DPI.

tools.name: Color Depth & Storage Calculator
tools.summary: Calculate uncompressed image storage size and total representable colours at any bit depth. Compares 1-bit through 48-bit, with realistic JPEG and PNG compression estimates.

categories.name: Cybersecurity
categories.tagline: Browser-only password and security tools. Nothing you type gets sent anywhere.

tools.name: Password Strength Calculator
tools.summary: Test how strong a password really is. Entropy, common-password check and crack-time estimates, all in your browser. Nothing you type is sent anywhere.

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.summary: Cryptographically secure passwords and passphrases generated in your browser. Uses Web Crypto. Nothing leaves the device. Disconnect your network and it still works.

tools.name: Data Breach Risk Score
tools.summary: Self-assess your breach exposure across passwords, 2FA, software hygiene and phishing awareness. Get a risk score and a prioritised fix list. All in your browser.

tools.name: Data Breach Cost Estimator
tools.summary: Estimate the financial impact of a data breach using IBM/Ponemon 2024 benchmarks. Per-record cost by sector, regional and sensitivity multipliers, GDPR and CCPA fine estimates, and a low/high range.

tools.name: Hash Generator
tools.summary: Generate SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 and SHA-1 hashes from text or files. Uses Web Crypto in your browser. Drag a 100MB file in, hash never leaves the device.

tools.name: Diceware Passphrase Generator
tools.summary: Generate a memorable Diceware passphrase from the EFF short wordlist (1,296 words) using Web Crypto. Pick word count, separator and capitalisation, see honest entropy figures. Browser-only.

tools.name: SSL Certificate Expiry Calculator
tools.summary: Paste an expiry date or a certificate's openssl text dump and see days remaining, urgency band, and the renewal date to set a reminder for. Browser-only date arithmetic, no network call.

tools.name: 2FA / TOTP Window Calculator
tools.summary: Reason about your TOTP authentication window. Period, digits, drift and clock skew in; effective acceptance window, per-attempt brute-force odds, attempts-per-second to a 50% hit, and a recommended drift setting out.

tools.name: Unit Converter
tools.summary: Length, mass, volume, temperature, speed and area. Pick a category, enter a value, see every common unit at once. Metric and imperial side by side.

tools.name: Cooking Measurements Converter
tools.summary: Convert cooking measurements across UK, US and metric conventions. Cups, tablespoons, fluid ounces, grams, ounces, gas mark to Celsius, plus cup-to-grams densities for the ingredients that actually matter.

tools.name: Time Zone Converter
tools.summary: Convert a date and time between IANA time zones. Pick a source, add as many target zones as you need, see day-of-week, local time and UTC offset for each. DST handled by your OS, browser-only.

tools.name: Roman Numeral Converter
tools.summary: Convert between numbers and Roman numerals in either direction. Range 1 to 3,999, lowercase normalised, malformed numerals like IIII or VV flagged with the canonical form. Working shown.

tools.name: Fuel Economy Converter
tools.summary: Live four-way conversion across MPG (UK), MPG (US), L/100km and km/L. Edit any one field, the other three update on the spot. Anchored on L/100km internally for stable round-trips.

tools.name: Number Base Converter
tools.summary: Convert between binary, octal, decimal and hexadecimal with live two-way binding, plus an arbitrary base (2 to 36) panel. BigInt internals so 64-bit values round-trip without precision loss.

categories.name: Finance
categories.tagline: Sensible estimates for everyday money decisions.

tools.name: US Mortgage Calculator
tools.summary: Work out your monthly US mortgage payment with principal, interest, property tax, home insurance, HOA and PMI broken out separately. Total interest and total cost over the life of the loan.

tools.name: UK Mortgage Calculator
tools.summary: Work out a UK monthly mortgage payment during the fixed-rate period and after it reverts to SVR, plus stamp duty and all the cash you need on completion day.

tools.name: Loan Calculator
tools.summary: Work out the monthly payment, total interest and total cost of any fixed-rate personal, auto or student loan. See how much you save by paying extra each month. Currency is a toggle (£ / $ / €).

tools.name: Compound Interest Calculator
tools.summary: See how a starting balance and regular contributions grow with compound interest, with optional inflation adjustment and a year-by-year breakdown. Currency is a toggle.

tools.name: Debt Payoff Calculator
tools.summary: Work out how long it takes to clear a debt and how much interest you pay. Add an extra monthly payment to see exactly how much time and interest you save.

tools.name: UK Salary Tax Calculator
tools.summary: UK take-home pay calculator for 2025/26. Enter your gross salary to see income tax, National Insurance, student loan deductions and monthly take-home. England, Wales and Northern Ireland rates.

tools.name: UK Stamp Duty Calculator
tools.summary: UK Stamp Duty Land Tax calculator for England and Northern Ireland, 2025/26 rates. Covers standard purchases, first-time buyers and additional properties, with the full band breakdown.

tools.name: Tip Calculator
tools.summary: Work out the tip, grand total and per-person share for any bill. Optional round-up-per-person mode keeps the numbers clean when the split is awkward. Currency toggle covers USD, GBP, EUR, CAD and AUD.

tools.name: Savings Goal Calculator
tools.summary: Work out the monthly number you need to put aside to hit a target amount by a target date. Factors in starting balance and optional interest. Currency toggle covers USD, GBP, EUR, CAD and AUD.

categories.name: Business
categories.tagline: Numbers for running, pricing, and growing a business.

tools.name: Break-Even Calculator
tools.summary: Calculate your break-even point in units and revenue. Enter fixed costs, variable cost per unit, and selling price to see exactly how many sales you need before you start making a profit.

tools.name: Profit Margin Calculator
tools.summary: Calculate gross and net profit margin from revenue and costs, or find the selling price needed to hit a target margin. Shows markup versus margin clearly.

tools.name: Freelance Day Rate Calculator
tools.summary: Work out the day rate you need to charge as a freelancer or contractor. Enter your income target, billable days, expenses, pension, and downtime to get a realistic day and hourly rate.

tools.name: UK VAT Calculator
tools.summary: Add or remove UK VAT at standard (20%), reduced (5%) or zero (0%) rates. See the net, VAT amount and gross instantly.

tools.name: ROI Calculator
tools.summary: Work out your return on investment as a percentage, net profit and annualised return (CAGR). Works for property, shares, business investments, ad spend and anything else with a cost and a return.

tools.name: SEO ROI Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your monthly SEO cost, current and projected organic traffic, and conversion data to see ROI, monthly profit, and the minimum sessions needed to break even.

tools.name: Email Marketing ROI Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your list size, send frequency, open and click rates, and conversion data to see ROI, monthly profit, cost per conversion, and the minimum list size needed to cover your costs.

tools.name: Website Performance Budget Calculator
tools.summary: Set realistic page-weight and Core Web Vitals targets for your site type and audience. See what a slow site is costing you in lost revenue.

tools.name: IT Support Build vs Buy Calculator
tools.summary: Compare the annual cost of hiring in-house IT support against an outsourced managed service. Shows annual totals, monthly equivalents, the verdict at your headcount, and the break-even users.

tools.name: Domain Renewal True Cost Calculator
tools.summary: See the real multi-year cost of a domain once the promo first-year price is gone and add-ons (privacy, email, DNS, SSL) are stacked up. Optional comparison against a cheaper registrar.

categories.name: Health
categories.tagline: Quick health and fitness numbers, with the caveats made plain.

tools.name: BMI Calculator
tools.summary: Work out your body mass index in metric or imperial units, with the WHO category and an honest note on what BMI can and cannot tell you.

tools.name: Calorie Calculator
tools.summary: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and daily calorie needs based on your age, weight, height and activity level. See how many calories to eat to lose, maintain or gain weight.

tools.name: Running Pace Calculator
tools.summary: Calculate your running pace, total finish time, or distance covered. Enter any two of pace, distance, and time. Metric and imperial, with race time predictions for 5K, 10K, half marathon and marathon.

tools.name: UK Marathon Course Difficulty Calculator
tools.summary: Drop in a GPX file for any UK marathon and a target flat pace. Get a terrain-adjusted finish time, the toughest sections flagged with the time you'll hit them, and a difficulty rating. Strava-style GAP model with late-race fatigue weighting.

tools.name: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
tools.summary: Work out your estimated due date from your last period, conception date, or IVF transfer date. Shows current gestational age, trimester, and key milestone dates.

tools.name: TDEE Calculator
tools.summary: Work out Total Daily Energy Expenditure and BMR using Mifflin-St Jeor, Harris-Benedict or Katch-McArdle. Includes cut and bulk targets and a starting macro split.

tools.name: Macro Split Calculator
tools.summary: Turn a daily calorie target into grams of protein, carbs and fat. Goal presets (balanced, high-protein cut, endurance, keto) or a custom three-slider ratio that always sums to 100. Per-meal breakdown included.

categories.name: Fun
categories.tagline: Calculators that don't pretend to be useful.

tools.name: Age in Months Calculator
tools.summary: Enter a date of birth and find out exactly how many months old you are. A reference to the Parenting Hell podcast bit about adults reporting their age the way parents of toddlers do.

tools.name: Date Difference Calculator
tools.summary: Enter two dates to see the gap in years, months, days, weeks, hours and weekdays. Auto-flips reversed dates so the answer is always positive.

tools.name: Decision Wheel
tools.summary: Type a list of options and spin a coloured wheel to pick one. Optional remove-winner mode for tournament-style elimination. Browser-only, uses Web Crypto for an unbiased draw.

tools.name: Dice and Coin Roller
tools.summary: Roll any combination of tabletop dice (2d6, 1d20+5, 4d6kh3) or flip up to 1000 coins. Browser-only, uses Web Crypto for an unbiased draw.

tools.name: Magic 8-Ball Generator
tools.summary: Ask any yes/no question. The classic 20-answer oracle, with 10 affirmative, 5 non-committal and 5 negative answers, weighted exactly like the original toy.

tools.name: Random Name Picker
tools.summary: Paste a list of names, choose how many to pick, get a fair random selection. Browser-only, uses Web Crypto for unbiased picks. Nothing you paste leaves the device.

categories.name: Productivity
categories.tagline: Browser-based tools for everyday tasks. Nothing uploaded, nothing stored.

tools.name: iCal Event Generator
tools.summary: Create a .ics calendar file for any event. Set the date, time, timezone, location and recurrence, then download and import into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, or any other calendar app.

tools.name: Meeting Cost Calculator
tools.summary: See what a meeting actually costs in money and lost productivity. Per-attendee breakdown, annualised weekly figure, person-hours, plus a live ticker that climbs in real time once you press start.

tools.name: Pomodoro Session Planner
tools.summary: Plan a chunk of focused work into Pomodoro sessions. Work out sessions needed, total focus and break time, finish time today, and how it splits across days when one day is not enough.

tools.name: Project Deadline Countdown Calculator
tools.summary: Count the calendar days, working days and working hours left until a project deadline. Tick the days you actually work, paste in any holidays, see the percentage elapsed and a mini-calendar of the days that count.

tools.name: Sprint Capacity Planner
tools.summary: Plan a sprint by capacity, not gut feel. Per-person availability, holidays, ceremonies and focus factor combine into person-hours, person-days and a story-point forecast with a confidence band.

tools.name: Time Card Calculator
tools.summary: Weekly timesheet calculator. Enter start and end times, plus unpaid breaks, for each day. Returns hours per day, total hours for the week, and total pay if you add an hourly rate. Handles overnight shifts.

categories.name: SEO
categories.tagline: Practical SEO tools that run in your browser.

tools.name: URL Slug Generator
tools.summary: Turn any heading into a clean, ASCII-safe, hyphen-separated URL slug. Optional stop-word stripping and length cap.

tools.name: Meta Length Checker
tools.summary: Check SEO title and meta description against Google's display limits in characters and approximate pixel width.

tools.name: Keyword Density Calculator
tools.summary: Paste an article or page and see word counts plus 1-, 2- and 3-gram keyword density tables. Optional stop-word filter, runs in your browser.

tools.name: Robots.txt Tester
tools.summary: Paste a robots.txt and check whether a URL is allowed or blocked for Googlebot, Bingbot or any user-agent. Follows Google's spec, shows the winning rule and why.

tools.name: CTR by SERP Position Estimator
tools.summary: Estimate clicks from a Google ranking. Pick a position 1–20, set monthly volume and SERP features, and see expected click-through rate based on Advanced Web Ranking 2024 data.

tools.name: SERP Snippet Preview Tool
tools.summary: Preview how a page title, meta description and URL render in Google's desktop and mobile search results. Truncation calculated by pixel width, not character count.

categories.name: Property
categories.tagline: Figures for buying, renting, moving, and maintaining a home.

tools.name: Rental Yield Calculator
tools.summary: Gross yield, net yield, monthly cash flow and return on deposit for any rental property. Currency toggle, workings shown.

tools.name: UK Mortgage Overpayment Calculator
tools.summary: See how much interest you save and how many years you shave off your UK repayment mortgage by paying extra each month or making a one-off lump sum. Yearly balance comparison and 12-month worked example.

tools.name: UK Rent vs Buy Calculator
tools.summary: Compare the net cost of buying a UK home against renting over any horizon. Stamp duty, mortgage interest, maintenance, selling costs and the opportunity cost of the deposit all included.

tools.name: UK House Move Cost Calculator
tools.summary: Total cost of moving home in the UK, broken out line by line. Stamp duty (SDLT, LBTT or LTT), conveyancing, mortgage fees, survey, removals, EPC and estate agent, with a best- and worst-case spread.

tools.name: UK Leasehold Ground Rent & Service Charge Calculator
tools.summary: Project annual cost over a chosen period for a UK leasehold flat. Models fixed, doubling and RPI-linked ground rent escalation, service charge inflation, and the post-2022 peppercorn rule.

tools.name: UK Section 24 Buy-to-Let Tax Impact Calculator
tools.summary: Compare your individual landlord tax bill before and after Section 24, plus a limited company corporation tax comparison. Shows the full step-by-step working and whether you have been pushed into a higher band.

categories.name: Wedding
categories.tagline: Planning tools for weddings. Timeline generators, date calculators, and checklists.

tools.name: Save the Date Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your wedding date to get a personalised planning timeline: when to send save-the-dates, book vendors, send formal invitations, set the RSVP deadline, and handle final preparations.

tools.name: Wedding Budget Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your total budget and guest count to get a recommended spend breakdown across venue, catering, photography, music, flowers, attire, stationery, transport, and contingency.

tools.name: Wedding Day Timeline Generator
tools.summary: Enter your ceremony time and reception end time to generate a complete wedding day schedule from bridal preparation through to carriages.

tools.name: Wedding Drinks Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your guest count and event duration to get bottle and quantity estimates for white wine, red wine, prosecco, beer, spirits, and soft drinks.

tools.name: Wedding Table Planner Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your guest count and preferred table size to find out how many tables you need, how many seats will be spare, and how alternative sizes compare.

tools.name: Wedding Catering Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your guest count, meal style, and number of courses to get portion counts and food weight estimates for every part of your wedding day.

tools.name: Wedding Anniversary Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your wedding date to find out which anniversary you are celebrating, the traditional and modern gift themes, and your upcoming milestone anniversaries.

categories.name: Writing
categories.tagline: Tools for writers, editors, and anyone working with words.

tools.name: Flesch Reading Ease Score Calculator
tools.summary: Paste text to get the Flesch Reading Ease score and Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level, with the underlying word, sentence and syllable counts.

tools.name: Headline Power-Word Score
tools.summary: Score a headline 0–100 based on power words, length, sentiment skew, numbers and stop-word ratio. Get suggestions to make it punchier.

tools.name: Read Time Calculator
tools.summary: Paste any text to see word count, character count, sentence count, and estimated reading time silently and aloud. Useful for blog posts, scripts, speeches, and podcast outlines.

tools.name: Word Count Tool
tools.summary: Live word, character, sentence and paragraph counts for pasted text, with fit-checks for tweet, meta description, SMS and SEO title limits.

tools.name: Suffolk Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.summary: Placeholder text in Suffolk dialect, drawn from Charlie Haylock's work and the East Anglian dialect tradition.

tools.name: English to Suffolk Translator
tools.summary: Paste English text and see it transformed into Suffolk dialect, word by word, using the same vocabulary as the Suffolk Lorem Ipsum generator.
